case_title: SHAH, JIGNESH vs. STANTURF, TERESA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAH, JIGNESH AS TO DEFENDANT STANTURF, TERESA HOPPER, PAUL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STANTURF, TERESA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STANTURF, TERESA
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAH, JIGNESH COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-14-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT HOPPER, PAUL

DEPT 6/COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN/REPORTER:SONIA WONG/CLERK:G SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY STEVEN LITTMAN PRESENT FOR PLTF. ANSWERING DEFT TERESA STANTURF IN PRO-PER, DOES NOT APPEAR. DEFT PAUL HOPPER HAS NOT ANSWERED AND HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. COURT DISMISSES ACTION AS TO DEFT HOPPER ONLY ON PLTF'S MOTION. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE AS TO DEFT T.STANTURF.COURT ORDERS JUDGMNT IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST DEFT T.STANTURF.PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMNT. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN & RELEASED TO PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANTURF, TERESA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1353 BUSH STREET, ROOM 201, SAN FRANCISCO; CA $2,220.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,220.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AWARDED TO PLTF PER COST BILL. COURT DISMISSES UNSERVED DEFT PAUL HOPPER WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLTF.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
